title: HubSpot Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is HubSpot worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: HubSpot Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: HubSpot is crm-powered email marketing for growing teams that positions itself for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform. Founded in 2006, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: HubSpot is a solid choice for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: HubSpot offers a free plan, with paid plans from $15/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: HubSpot works best for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well.

faq.a: Yes, HubSpot has a free plan supporting up to 1000 subscribers.

faq.q: What is HubSpot best used for?
faq.a: HubSpot is best for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform. Its standout features include drag-drop editor, crm integration, automation.

faq.q: Does HubSpot have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, HubSpot runs an affiliate program paying 30% recurring.
